assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 14: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' matches exactly the original in claude-md-configured.md line 14.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 15: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row added with serena_ui as the Serena Instance column value.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-23 are identical to claude-md-configured.md lines 19-23: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md uses explicit 'Added' and 'Preserved' labels: Section 1 marks trustify-ui row as 'Added' and trustify-backend row as 'Preserved'; Section 2 marks serena_ui limitation as 'Added' and serena_backend limitation as 'Preserved'. Additionally, a 'Sections Preserved (No Changes)' table lists Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence body, and Bug Configuration as preserved.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 table shows serena_backend with 'Already in Registry?' = 'Yes' and serena_ui with 'Already in Registry?' = 'No'. Line 37: 'New instance `serena_ui` requires user input'. Step 5: '`## Code Intelligence` already exists and documents `serena_backend`. New Serena instance `serena_ui` was discovered in Step 2'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-40 preserve the original naming convention text ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name'), the mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol example code block, and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is line 41: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 43-47 match the original exactly: Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks. discovery-log.md Step 9 states: 'Bug Configuration is up to date. All three required fields are populated... No changes needed.' changes-log.md lists Bug Configuration as 'Preserved | All 3 required fields already populated'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10: '`## Security Configuration` does not exist in current CLAUDE.md. Asked user whether to enable security triage. User declined. Security Configuration skipped.' changes-log.md Sections Not Created table: '`## Security Configuration` | User declined to enable security triage'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file.
